metadata.title: E2E Wiring Verification — Double-Check ALL Pipeline Components
metadata.priority: P0 — blocks debug AND production run
metadata.rationale: The external test dataset wiring failure (analysis_flow._build_dataloaders_from_config returns {}) revealed a systemic pattern: infrastructure code exists but is never wired into the pipeline. This plan systematically audits EVERY component in the e2e chain.

plan.user-prompt-verbatim: create a critical P0 task to double-check that EVERY FUCKING PLANNED component needed on this debug and full production run are actually wired and not just planned as some stub! (the actual stubs that can stay as stubs such as Posthog and Sentry for example obviously can stay stubs)

audit-results.summary: Audited all 5 flows + trainer + evaluation_runner + biostatistics DuckDB + metric keys. Found 6 P0 blockers, 4 P1 issues, and confirmed 3 acceptable stubs.

p0-blockers.blocker: STUB returning {}. External test datasets NEVER evaluated. Silent failure. Status: Will be fixed by test-sets plan Phase 3 (T-J3a).
NOT_IMPLEMENTED. No code wires data_flow external discovery → DataLoaders → analysis. Status: Will be fixed by test-sets plan Phase 3 (T-J3a/b/c).
Uses underscore prefix: eval_{ds}_{subset}_{metric}. Should be eval/{ds}/{subset}/{metric}. Status: Will be fixed by GROUP C (T-C1) — MLflow migration agent running.
Hardcoded to underscore format. Will break when writers migrate to slash-prefix. Status: Will be fixed by GROUP C (T-C2) — MLflow migration agent running.
All metrics pooled. No concept of trainval vs test separation. Status: Will be fixed by test-sets plan Phase 6 (T-J6a/b/c/d).
No table for test/ prefix metrics. No test/ prefix recognition in parsers. Status: Will be fixed by test-sets plan Phase 5 (T-J5a/b/c).

issue.component: trainer: stopped_early not logged to MLflow

p1-issues.issue: Value computed and returned but never logged via mlflow.log_metric. Status: Will be fixed by GROUP D (T-D2) — MLflow migration agent running.

CalibrationPlugin, CRCConformal, ConSeCo all need calibration_data but it's never passed by any caller. Plugins report validation_failed (LOUD — acceptable for debug). Status: Deferred to post-debug. Not blocking for 2-epoch debug run.
Uses "minivess_training" instead of resolving from upstream analysis flow. Status: Will be fixed as part of GROUP E integration tests.
post_{plugin}_{metric} instead of post/{plugin}/{metric}. Status: Will be fixed by GROUP C slash-prefix migration.

phase.name: Metric Key Convention Migration
phase.description: Agent a3e61ee running: migrate eval writers + DuckDB readers to slash-prefix

phase.name: Logging Gaps
phase.description: Agent a3e61ee running: stopped_early + inference latency

phase.name: Integration Tests
phase.description: E2E contract tests for all 5 flow pairs
